overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a leather jacket walking through rainy London streets at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes through narrow urban alleys with reflective pavement and street lighting.

events.description: character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk

tall black lamppost casting yellow light on wet pavement
white zebra crossing stripes on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Character walks along a wet city sidewalk next to brick townhouses at night, illuminated by street lamps. The character approaches and crosses a marked crosswalk while a pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with mixed commercial buildings

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the sidewalk curve
character crosses another street section near parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more open urban area with wider streets, passing various pedestrians including a woman in a yellow jacket. The environment features mixed commercial buildings, street trees, and parked vehicles along the curb.

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a narrower, darker urban passage with high walls and metal fencing. The scene becomes more enclosed as the character approaches and enters a concrete underpass with graffiti-covered walls and digital advertisement screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alley with graffiti and covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow industrial alley with extensive graffiti covering the walls, passing under covered walkways between old brick buildings. The lighting shifts to a warmer tone from building lights, and a worker in an orange vest stands near a doorway in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy London night, transitioning from open, lamp-lit residential streets into a claustrophobic industrial alley. It begins with the character walking past brick townhouses and crossing a marked crosswalk, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of street lamps. As the character moves forward, the environment opens into a wider urban area filled with pedestrians and parked vehicles before shifting toward a more enclosed space. The scene then narrows into a dark passage with high walls and metal fencing, leading the character through a concrete underpass adorned with graffiti and digital advertisement screens. Finally, the camera follows the character into a tight industrial alleyway where the lighting turns warmer, passing under covered walkways toward a distant worker in an orange vest.
